title: Design Glassmorphic User Interface
description: Create a modern, visual design system for the Todo application using CSS glassmorphism, glowing gradients, and clean typography.

subtasks.title: Configure Vite for Multi-Page App entrypoints

notes.content: Must use 'Outfit' font from Google Fonts for a sleek tech feel.

title: Implement Node.js Express REST APIs
description: Develop robust CRUD endpoints in Express to handle list retrieval, single item fetching, creation, deletion, and updates. Persist state in a local JSON database.

subtasks.title: Create GET /api/todos/:id to return full subtasks and notes
Create PUT, POST, and DELETE endpoints

notes.content: Use ES Modules (import/export) instead of CommonJS require to match Vite's frontend standard.

title: Prepare Presentation Walkthrough
description: Write documentation in markdown explaining project structure, features, CSS methods, and build instructions. Record screenshots of the beautiful pages.
